title: Diamond Buildings
body:
# Diamond Buildings  
If you are tired of the plain and unremarkable structures in the original version and want more magnificent building blocks, then this mod is for you.

## Features  
- In this mod, you can use diamonds, gold, or iron as building materials—even to construct entire houses.  
- Fully available in survival mode, as you can freely craft these blocks.  
- You’ll get better-looking diamond doors and gold doors, including trapdoors.  

## Advice  
- Hope you have fun playing with your friends! : )
